name: AI Video Generation & Multi-Platform Publish
description: Claude AI generates creative video concepts with scene descriptions, image prompts, and scripts, saves them to Google Sheets for tracking, then posts formatted announcements to both Discord and Slack channels.

source.originalName: Fully automated AI video generation & multi-platform publishing

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving video concepts

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting video announcements

discordKey.description: Discord connection key for posting video announcements

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post video announcements (e.g. '#video-content')

discordChannelId.description: Discord channel ID to post video announcements

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for video concept tracking

topic.description: Topic or niche for video generation (e.g. 'AI tutorials', 'cooking hacks', 'tech reviews')

videoCount.description: Number of video concepts to generate (default: 3)

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for video concept generation
Run Claude AI to generate video concepts
Parse Claude AI output and strip fences
Prepare video concept rows for Google Sheets
Save video concepts to Google Sheets
Build Discord embed for video concepts
Build Slack Block Kit message for video concepts
